productDisplayName: Nike Men Manchester United Black Jersey
description: CompositionBlack manchester united jersey made of 100% polyester Dri-Fit fabric that has a round neckline with red ribbing and black tipping, red ribbed sleeve cuffs with black tipping, Manchester United badge on the upper left chest, swoosh logo on the upper right chest, red and white rubber print horizontal stripe on the upper chest below the swoosh and the seal, mesh panels on the side seams made of 100% polyester and rubber print of the words - Manchester United  and seal on the backFittingComfortWash careMachine was coldWash separately with like coloursDo not use softenersRemove immediatelyDo not allow to lay on itself when wetDo not bleach or iron Do not dry cleanReturn to greatness with the black Manchester United football Club Soccer jersey from nike. This jersey pays homage to the incredibly successful team with strong design details like the team colours and club badge. The Dri-FIT performance fabric and mesh panels on the sides ensures breathability and comfort on and off the field. This sweat-wicking Dri-FIT fabric was made from 100% recycled polyester thereby the production of this jersey has minimal environmental impact. Team this with jeans and tees for trips to the football games or for casual outings.
